executive_summary: Latest updates from 3 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 3 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: Iran war Day 34 | ‘Back to the Stone Age’: Trump sets 2-week deadline to ‘finish. Iran warns strike on Bushehr nuclear plant would be a ‘war crime’. Iran war: What is happening on day 34 of US-Israel attacks?. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: Iran war Day 34 | ‘Back to the Stone Age’: Trump sets 2-week deadline to ‘finish
key_developments.detail: Iran war Day 34: In his first address to the nation since the war began on February 28, US President Donald Trump said Wednesday night local time the war is “nearing completion.” He added that the US is going to hit Iran “very hard” in the next two weeks , bringing them “back to the Stone Age where

key_developments.headline: Iran warns strike on Bushehr nuclear plant would be a ‘war crime’
key_developments.detail: Iran has warned that any US or Israeli strike on its Bushehr nuclear power plant would amount to a “war crime” under international law, its envoy to the UN’s atomic watchdog told AFP on Thursday. key_developments.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 34 of US-Israel attacks?
key_developments.detail: Iran has launched a new wave of missiles at Israel after United States President Donald Trump said Washington had “destroyed the Iranian military” and was close to achieving its war objectives. terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
